name: 1'6"x2'6" Absorbing Embossed Floral Doormat Green - Room Essentials™: Outdoor & Indoor Skid-Resistant Door Mat
description:
Add visual interest and comfort to your entryway with this Absorbing Embossed Floral Doormat from Room Essentials™. This doormat with embossed florals is made from lightweight polyester fabric and helps wipe dirt from guests' shoes at the door, while the skid-resistant rubber backing helps keep it in place. The fade-, UV-, and stain-resistant construction helps keep it looking its best for longer, and the low pile height makes it great for placement in high-traffic areas.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
